title: V3 Telephony Bootstrap
summary: Added Twilio dialer abstraction and outbound call implementation
Added bridge telephony endpoints: POST /telephony/call, POST /twilio/voice, POST /twilio/status
Wired telephony configuration in runtime bootstrap
Added bridge tests for telephony success and unavailable paths
Added ADR-0009 for telephony outbound bootstrap contract
rollback_steps: Remove telephony dialer and bridge telephony endpoints
Revert telephony runtime wiring in src/index.ts
open_items: Add Mission Control dial controls and active call panel
